input.content:
Commit warning fixture for reviewers only.

Bad next step before the full check:
git add examples/eval_prek_trace_helper.py && git commit -m "add eval prek trace helper"

Required command before any real commit:
uv run prek run --all-files

content.text: I will run a local smoke check and status only; the commit command remains fixture text.

input.command:
# Fixture only: git add examples/eval_prek_trace_helper.py && git commit -m 'add eval prek trace helper'
uv run python -m py_compile examples/eval_prek_trace_helper.py || true
git status --short
